title: Lead Revenue Manager at Ananda in the Himalayas

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Ananda in the Himalayas
jsonLd.description:
We at Ananda in the Himalayas are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ananda in the Himalayas:
Ananda in the Himalayas is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas!
